1. HANGING detected — Inspect burden distribution immediately
2. Review blast parameters; reduce wind if required
3. Follow SOP for hanging remediation

extra_coke.charge_seq_anomaly: Two consecutive Extra C dumps; H-2 surplus (+7 ΔFR)
extra_coke.reason: Slight deficit after surplus H-2; precautionary extra coke to stabilise burden.

extra_coke.slag_feo_pct: Moderate extra coke (2 dumps). THM rises +12°C. Si increases 0.06% — remains within normal limits (0.42→0.48%). FeO drops (better reduction efficiency). Routine stabilisation; no escalation required.

extra_coke.preceding_hr: Two consecutive Extra C after H-2 surplus (+7 ΔFR)
extra_coke.prec_delta_fr: Overcorrection cycle; H-2 surplus → precautionary extra.
extra_coke.si_pct: Verify no sustained surplus; cross-check with cast [Si].

extra_coke.charge_seq_anomaly: Double dump; H-5 coke rate spike 610 kg/t (anomalous)
extra_coke.reason: Slight deficit H-5 (ΔFR −5); H-5 coke spike 610 kg/t → dual extra coke to stabilise.

extra_coke.slag_feo_pct: Dual dump: AFT +35°C, ΔTHM +12°C. Si approaches 0.49% — near upper operating limit. Confirm with cast sample. If [Si] >0.50% in next cast: reduce blast temp by 20°C or cut PCI by 10 kg/t.

extra_coke.preceding_hr: Dual dump; H-5 coke spike 610 kg/t + slight deficit
extra_coke.prec_delta_fr: H-5 coke rate instability (610 vs design ~415). Slight deficit triggered dual dump.
extra_coke.si_pct: ⚠ Investigate H-5 coke spike; confirm steady-state by H-2.

extra_coke.charge_seq_anomaly: Extra coke despite H-8 thermal surplus (+9 ΔFR) — burden anomaly
extra_coke.reason: Thermal surplus H-8 (+9 ΔFR); extra coke for burden/permeability, not thermal deficit.

extra_coke.slag_feo_pct: Surplus state amplified by extra coke: THM projected 1502°C. Si = 0.48%, borderline. Paradox: extra coke charged despite surplus — investigate burden distribution. Monitor blast parameters.

extra_coke.preceding_hr: Extra coke despite H-8 thermal surplus (+9 ΔFR) — permeability issue
extra_coke.prec_delta_fr: Thermal surplus yet extra coke: points to burden distribution/shaft permeability issue.
extra_coke.si_pct: ⚠ Check shaft probes, burden distribution, permeability index.

extra_coke.charge_seq_anomaly: ⚠ CRITICAL: 4 extra dumps; H-11 coke=680 kg/t (12-hr max)
extra_coke.reason: ⚠ CRITICAL – H-11 coke spike 680 kg/t + slight deficit. Likely process instability / chilled hearth.

extra_coke.slag_feo_pct: ⚠ CRITICAL: 4 dumps / 12.7t → AFT +72°C, THM +24°C to 1514°C. [Si]=0.54% (HIGH), [C]=4.61%, [Ti]=0.13%. Risk of Si spike >0.6% in next 1-2 casts. Immediate action: cut blast temp, reduce PCI, check tap-hole performance.

extra_coke.preceding_hr: ⚠ FOUR dumps (04:01–04:36); H-11 coke=680 kg/t (12-hr max). THM simulation → 1514°C, [Si]=0.54%
extra_coke.prec_delta_fr: Process instability: possible chilled hearth, burden slip, tuyere blockage at 04:00 shift. Amplified by 680 kg/t coke anomaly.
extra_coke.c_pct: Quadruple extra coke; escalated to shift manager.
extra_coke.si_pct: 🚨 URGENT: Review cast Si/C/Ti, hearth temps, tuyere, taphole 04:00–05:00. Escalate to furnace manager.

extra_coke.charge_seq_anomaly: Single extra dump; H-11 slight deficit (ΔFR −5). Possible precursor to H-10.
extra_coke.reason: Preceding thermal unavailable. H-11 slight deficit; precursor to H-10 event.

extra_coke.slag_feo_pct: Single dump, controlled effect: THM +6°C. Si and C rise marginally (0.03%). FeO drops slightly. Likely valid precautionary measure. Monitor trend continuation vs H-10 instability.

extra_coke.preceding_hr: Single extra dump; H-11 slight deficit (ΔFR −5). Precursor to H-10 event.
extra_coke.prec_delta_fr: Limited context; slight deficit. Possible precursor to subsequent H-10 instability.
extra_coke.si_pct: Correlate with H-10 investigation; check thermal trend from H-11.
